1.0.0.name: com.notpvpbros.mmdunity
1.0.0.description: An EditorWindow tool to quickly build and duplicate MMD blendshapes within Unity.

2.0.0.name: com.notpvpbros.mmdunity
2.0.0.description: Build the full MMD blendshape chart (59 targets) on any avatar: weighted multi-source merging, recipe synthesis for missing expressions, L/R wink and brow splitting, and katakana spelling variants for maximum dance-world compatibility.

2.0.1.name: com.notpvpbros.mmdunity
2.0.1.description: Build the full MMD blendshape chart (59 targets) on any avatar: weighted multi-source merging, recipe synthesis for missing expressions, L/R wink and brow splitting, and katakana spelling variants for maximum dance-world compatibility. 2.0.1: prefill now proposes real source mappings instead of self-filling targets that already exist, adds category-guarded matching, sided eye-close winks, and a prefill report.

2.0.2.name: com.notpvpbros.mmdunity
2.0.2.description: Build the full MMD blendshape chart (59 targets) on any avatar: weighted multi-source merging, recipe synthesis for missing expressions, L/R wink and brow splitting, and katakana spelling variants for maximum dance-world compatibility. 2.0.2: Blender-add-on-style rows — the chosen source shape now shows directly in each dropdown; prefill results are immediately visible and editable.
